description: A visually impaired user reports that the audio description track for a TV show is silent.

nodes.task_description: Identify the asset and verify the presence of an audio description track.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent confirms the file should have an audio description track, but it is missing or corrupt.

nodes.task_description: Request a corrected file with a valid audio description track from the content provider.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent sends a re-delivery request for the accessible version of the content.

nodes.task_description: Once received, replace the faulty file on the streaming servers.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent ingests, QCs, and replaces the file, resolving the issue.
